ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "blurb" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "goal" TEXT /* Funding goal of the project */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the project */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the project */,
  "launched_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was launched */,
  "staff_pick" INTEGER /* Whether the project is a staff pick */,
  "spotlight" INTEGER /* Whether the project is spotlighted */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the project */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the project_creators table */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the subcategories table */,
  "current_funding" TEXT /* Current amount of funding received */,
  "backer_count" INTEGER /* Number of backers for the project */,
  "funding_status" TEXT /* Status of the project's funding */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the project's social media pages */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Keywords for search purposes */,
  "privacy_settings" TEXT /* Visibility settings for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES project_creators ("creator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID for hierarchical categories */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the category icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the categories table */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the subcategory icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_categories" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the projects table */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the categories table */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the category for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the backer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the backer */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the backer's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the backer's social media profiles */,
  "privacy_settings" TEXT /* Visibility settings for the backer's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pledges" (
  "pledge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pledge */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the projects table */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the backers table */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount pledged */,
  "pledged_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pledge was made */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the rewards table */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for tracking purposes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the pledge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pledge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the projects table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the reward */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Number of rewards available */,
  "quantity_claimed" INTEGER /* Number of rewards claimed */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Cost of shipping the reward */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date of the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reward_backers" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the rewards table */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the backers table */,
  "shipped_date" TEXT /* Date and time the reward was shipped */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Delivery status of the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id", "backer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_creators" (
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project creator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project creator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the project creator */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the creator's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the creator's social media profiles */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the creator */,
  "project_count" INTEGER /* Number of projects created by the creator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_creator_projects" (
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the project_creators table */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the projects table */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the creator in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id", "project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the user's social media profiles */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the projects table */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the project_creators table */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date and time the update was made */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of the update */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of any media associated with the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES project_creators ("creator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the projects table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes for the comment */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes for the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
